title: UltimaCraft PBR
description: PBR add-on for UltimaCraft. Adds Optifine shader support for textures using LabPBR format.
body:
![](https://i.ibb.co/zVm1yWJ/ultimacraft-pbr-v-1-9.jpg)

# UltimaCraft PBR

**UltimaCraft PBR** - is an extension of the [UltimaCraft resource pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/ultimacraft)

## Features

Optifine (with shaders):
- reflections on blocks and items
- parallax effect
- bumped texture (normal maps)
- LabPBR support

## Mod support

- [Biomes O' Plenty](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biomes-o-plenty)

---

_© You can use UltimaCraft PBR publicly, but you can not claim it as your property._
